text.title: decimal-as-string-pattern Output Contract
text.summary: Pattern catalog + JSON Schema for an invoice line item using pattern-constrained strings.

section.title: JSON Schema (line item)

example.note: Pattern matches; consumer parses `Decimal("19.99") * 3 = Decimal("59.97")` with no drift.
SKU lowercase fails the uppercase pattern; price is a float and triggers binary-rounding drift on the consumer side.

list.item: Trim leading/trailing whitespace before pattern match.
Upper-case SKU before storage if domain allows.
Every money field uses `pattern` with exact decimal count.
No JSON `number` type for currency, IBANs, phone numbers, or timestamps.
Every patterned field has a `description` with the format and an example.
Consumer code parses to `Decimal`/`int`/`datetime` immediately after validation.
